audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds via two mechanisms: (1) P2P validation enforces len(Column)==len(KzgCommitments)==len(KzgProofs) at p2p_interface.go:47, invoked on all external inputs; (2) local/reconstruction paths construct sidecars via dataColumnsSidecars() which creates equal-length arrays by construction (das_core.go:241-255).
